steps.title: Match subject and time
steps.content: The subject is Ann Greely, a single person. The phrase in the late 1800s places the action in the past, so the verb must be singular and past tense.

steps.title: Reject plural forms
steps.content: Choice B is plural present perfect. Choice C is plural present tense. Choice D is past tense but plural for this context. The singular past-tense form agrees with Ann Greely and the late-1800s time frame. The answer is A.
